parameters.query: SELECT o.order_id, o.status, o.priority, o.customer_email, o.customer_name, o.created_at, o.updated_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - o.updated_at))/3600 AS hours_in_status FROM orders o WHERE o.status NOT IN ('DELIVERED', 'CANCELLED', 'FAILED', 'DUPLICATE') AND (   (o.priority = 'high'    AND o.status = 'RECEIVED'    AND o.created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour')  OR (o.priority = 'high'    AND o.status = 'ALLOCATED'   AND o.updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours') OR (o.priority = 'high'    AND o.status = 'PROCESSING'  AND o.updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours') OR (o.priority = 'high'    AND o.status = 'DISPATCHED'  AND o.updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') OR (o.priority = 'normal'   AND o.status = 'RECEIVED'    AND o.created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '4 hours')  OR (o.priority = 'normal'   AND o.status IN ('ALLOCATED','PROCESSING') AND o.updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '8 hours')  OR (o.priority = 'normal'   AND o.status = 'DISPATCHED'  AND o.updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '72 hours') OR o.status = 'DISPATCH_FAILED' OR (o.status = 'BACKORDERED'  AND o.updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours') ) ORDER BY o.priority DESC, o.updated_at ASC;

meta.description: Scheduled every 30 minutes. Queries orders breaching SLA thresholds by priority and status stage, sends tiered Slack alerts (CRITICAL/WARNING), logs escalations, and stores summary reports.
